MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff MICHAEL FUSARO, is present. Represented by APPENRODT
Attorney, JOSEPH SACRAMENTO, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, MARIA ANAST, is present.
Attorney, KENNETH GREENSTEIN, representing the defendant through FULL scope.
The Judge Pro Tem ROGER RUBIN, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 503A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-24-2010 is vacated.

MARIA ANAST, TEL. NO. 359-9714, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT MARIA ANAST'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE IS SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH PERSONAL SERVICE. RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT TO BE FILED 5 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Joanne Farrell, CSR # 4838 =(301/PJB)
